description: SYNTHETIC daily exchange rates for 8 countries against the US dollar, from 1990 to 2010 (~61k rows). Generated using Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process with mean reversion, volatility clustering, and seasonal patterns. Columns: date, country, exchange_rate, interest_rate_diff, inflation_diff, trade_balance, volatility_index.
target: Forecast exchange_rate for each country. Interested in both short-term (a few days out) and longer-term (a few weeks to a couple months). Curious which countries are more predictable than others and whether the exogenous features help.
